events.description: Woodside High Drama Department production of The Wizard of Oz. Doors open 30 minutes before showtime. Concessions available at intermission. Tickets: Adults $15, Students/Seniors $10, Children under 5 Free. Purchase at woodsidedrama.org/tickets. Other showtimes include April 4 at 2:00 PM and 7:00 PM, and April 5 at 2:00 PM.
